name: XAU M15 ATR Breakout Trend with ADX Regime
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, when ADX(14) > 25 indicating trending regime and ATR percentile > 50 indicating sufficient volatility, a breakout above the prior 20-bar Donchian high (long) or below the 20-bar Donchian low (short) confirmed by a candle body >= 0.8 ATR will continue in the breakout direction long enough to yield >=1.5R on average. Falsifiable: if PF<1.3 or trend-continuation win rate<40% over 200+ trades, hypothesis is rejected.

entry_rules.long: close > donchian_upper[1] AND (close - open) >= 0.8 * atr(14) AND regime_active AND session_active
entry_rules.short: close < donchian_lower[1] AND (open - close) >= 0.8 * atr(14) AND regime_active AND session_active

notes: Addresses prior failure: XAU trends are exploited here rather than faded. ADX+ATR regime gate prevents chop. Donchian breakout with candle-body confirmation reduces false breaks.
